title: Fix: Adagio resumes during phone call when user had manually paused
description: Bug: When using Android Auto, if user pauses Adagio then makes a phone call, Adagio resumes when the call connects. Root cause: resume() has no audio focus check, and doPlay() doesn't abort when audio focus is denied. Fix: request audio focus in resume() and abort if denied; abort doPlay() if focus denied.

title: Fix favorites crash with duplicate accounts
description: Two active accounts with same channels produce duplicate channel IDs, crashing FavoritesScreen LazyColumn
close_reason: Fixed by scoping channel IDs to account ID, preventing duplicate keys in LazyColumn

title: Chromecast support
description: Add Chromecast/Google Cast functionality to allow casting audio streams to Chromecast-compatible devices.
close_reason: Implemented Chromecast support with CastManager, cast-aware VLCPlayerWrapper, CastButton in mini player and now playing sheet

title: First-time setup / onboarding wizard
description: When loading the app for the first time, show a welcome page that asks connection type (Xtreme Codes or M3U), then collects Name, URL, and credentials. Include skip option for custom M3U users.
close_reason: Implemented first-time setup wizard with welcome, connection type, and account details steps

title: Fix SSL cert error and broken pull-to-refresh on channels page
description: Two bugs: (1) Tailscale/self-signed certs cause CertPathValidatorException because network_security_config only trusts system certs. (2) After error, pull-to-refresh stops working because empty state Box isn't scrollable inside PullToRefreshBox.
close_reason: Fixed SSL cert trust and pull-to-refresh empty state

title: Fix AA favorites wrong metadata due to lastBrowsedParentId race
description: AA pre-fetches multiple browse groups in parallel, overwriting lastBrowsedParentId. When user taps a favorite, channelListForContext uses wrong group, causing getState() to report wrong playlist item metadata.
close_reason: Fixed channelListForContext to validate channel membership before using lastBrowsedParentId group

title: Fix AA favorites showing wrong channel data due to unstable channel IDs
description: Channel IDs use UUID.randomUUID() and regenerate every time channels load. When AA caches browse tree items or the service restarts, the cached mediaIds become stale, causing onAddMediaItems to fail to find the channel. The previous channel's metadata persists, showing wrong data (e.g. 'Radio: Arizona Diamondbacks' instead of '90s on 9').
close_reason: Fixed with three changes: (1) deterministic channel IDs via UUID.nameUUIDFromBytes instead of randomUUID, (2) fallback name-based lookup in onAddMediaItems, (3) stale-metadata guard in getState()

title: Fix AA now-playing metadata never auto-updating
description: VLCSessionPlayer's combine only observes playbackState and currentChannel, not trackMetadata. When SXM polling updates track info every 15s, the now-playing display never refreshes because invalidateState() is never called.

title: Fix AA favorite showing wrong channel metadata
description: When selecting a favorite in Android Auto, onAddMediaItems uses channel.group for metadata instead of channelSubtitle(). This causes a race where Media3 displays stale metadata from the previous channel before VLCSessionPlayer's combine updates.

title: AA: Fix crash on channel tap, missing metadata, broken skip, clock reset
description: Four Android Auto bugs: 1) Crash starting stream, 2) No XMPlaylist data, 3) Next/prev buttons do nothing, 4) Clock counts 0,1,2 and resets
close_reason: Fixed all 4 AA bugs plus added channel change debouncing

title: Fix AA playback after app restart — service not started
description: When the app is killed and restarted while connected to Android Auto, the AudioPlaybackService is never started because it only starts via VLCPlayerWrapper.play(). AA holds a stale reference to the old dead session, so tapping a channel in the browse tree does nothing — play() is never called. Fix: start the service from MainActivity.onCreate() so the media session is available for AA to reconnect.
close_reason: Start AudioPlaybackService from MainActivity.onCreate() so media session is always available for Android Auto

title: Fix Android Auto showing no browse content
description: Android Auto just shows 'Adagio Stream' with nothing selectable. The onGetChildren likely returns empty because channels haven't loaded yet when Android Auto first requests the browse tree. Need to ensure channels are loaded before serving browse results, or handle the empty state better.

title: Fix mini player blur: glassBackground blurs content instead of background
description: On Android 12+, the glassBackground modifier applies Modifier.blur(20.dp) to the content itself, making all text, images, and buttons unreadable. Need to remove the blur from content and just use a semi-transparent background.

title: OWASP Top 10 security evaluation of Android app
Custom Playlists (My M3Us) - create, rename, reorder, share, add manual streams, organize into groups
Android Auto controls don't work
App crashes when attempting to share a log
Cleanup: remove old flat layout, verify build
description: Remove any leftover dead code from the old flat layout and verify the project builds.

title: Section 4: Advanced sub-screen
description: Create a new Advanced Settings screen with Channel Sort, Group Sort, Sort Prefixes, Debug Logging + Share/Clear, and Clear All Favorites. Add navigation route and card on main settings.

title: Section 5: About section
description: Consolidate About info: App name, Version, Build, Licenses link.

title: Section 3: Channels & Accounts section
description: Group Accounts card, Groups card, Grouping mode picker, Reload Channels button, and inline channel/favorites counts into a Channels & Accounts section.

title: Section 2: Playback section
description: Group Startup Channel, Buffer Duration, Stream Quality indicator, and Live Score Updates interval into a Playback section.

title: Section 1: Appearance section
description: Group Appearance Mode, Text Size, and Artwork Display Mode into an Appearance section with a section header card.

title: Reorganize Settings Screen for Better UX
description: Reorganize the flat settings screen into 5 logical sections matching iOS parity: Appearance, Playback, Channels & Accounts, Advanced (sub-screen), and About. Currently all ~17 settings are in a single flat scrollable list with no grouping.

title: Show custom playlists in Android Auto browse tree
description: Custom playlists (CustomPlaylistManager) are not exposed in the AA browse tree. Need to add them as browsable items at root level, with their groups and entries as sub-levels, and handle playback resolution for custom playlist entries.
close_reason: Custom playlists now appear in AA browse tree with full navigation, playback resolution, and search support

title: Convert ESPN pre-game times to local timezone
description: ESPN API returns times in ET via shortDetail. iOS parses the event date and re-formats in local timezone. Android should do the same.
close_reason: Added gameDate parsing from ESPN event.date and localStartTime property that formats in device timezone

title: Add baseball diamond indicator for base runners
description: Draw a diamond indicator in Compose Canvas showing which bases have runners. Display in now playing sheet and channel list for live MLB games.

title: Fix bitrate display showing 1kbps
description: VLC bitrate polling shows wrong value. The peak-based approach with stats.inputBitrate may return stale/averaged data in VLC 4.0 EAP. Switch to showing current bitrate instead of peak.

title: Show balls/strikes/bases for live MLB games
description: ESPN API provides balls, strikes, onFirst, onSecond, onThird in the situation object, but only outs is passed through to ESPNGameInfo. Need to add count and baserunners to the display in channel list and now playing.
close_reason: Added balls, strikes, and base runner fields to ESPNGameInfo; count now shows in MLB liveDetail as B-S format

title: Mini Player inline LIVE button and time-shift indicator (orange dot + status)
Android Auto: add loved songs browsing, star/heart buttons in now playing
Share intent receiver to add M3U URLs from other apps into custom playlists
Lock screen widget / Live Activity equivalent showing channel, artwork, and playback state
Track time stuck at 0:00 and doesn't count past 2
Error retry button in Now Playing sheet
Reload Channels button in Settings
Configurable ESPN score polling frequency in settings (5s, 10s, 15s, 30s)
Drag-to-reorder favorite groups
Auto-play startup channel on Android Auto connect
Channel grouping modes: All Groups, By Provider, By Source

value: Android Studio bundled Java is at /Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home — set JAVA_HOME to this path when running Gradle builds
